title: SkyDeck.ai for Teams — Governed, Collaborative AI Agents
description: Give your team always-on AI agents in persistent Agent Pods — operate them together, one Driver at a time, with every run governed by Control Center spend guardrails.
h1: AI Agents Your Whole Team Can Run Together
lede: Run Claude Code, OpenClaw, and custom agents in shared Agent Pods, collaborate live with one Driver at a time, and govern every run from the Control Center.
html:
Give your whole team a set of always-on AI agents — shared, collaborative, and governed from one place.

Put agents to work where your team already works

SkyDeck.ai gives every team a place to run AI agents that keep working after you close the tab. Launch an Agent Pod — a persistent cloud workspace — drop in Claude Code, OpenClaw, or a custom agent, and let it run. The main terminal survives your disconnects, so a long task keeps going while the rest of the team moves on to the next thing. Idle pods auto-sleep to save spend and resume exactly where they left off, so nothing is lost between sessions.

  • Run agents around the clock in persistent pods, not throwaway sessions.
  • Keep everyone in GenStudio for day-to-day chat, prompts, and shared tools.
  • Govern every run from the Control Center — access, data controls, and spend.

Operate one agent together, with a clear line of control

Collaboration on SkyDeck follows a simple rule: one Driver holds the keyboard at a time while everyone else observes live. Teammates watch every keystroke read-only, then request or give control when it is their turn. Hand off across time zones and an agent keeps moving through the night — follow-the-sun work without the collisions of a shared login. It turns real code review, onboarding, and incident response into something a group does inside the same terminal instead of over a screen-share.

  • One Driver at a time — exactly one person controls the agent, so no two people fight over the same session.
  • Request and give control — pass the keyboard in a click when the work moves to another teammate.
  • Read-only observers — reviewers, new hires, and stakeholders follow along without interfering.

Support every function from one workspace

Because pods run any agent and GenStudio reaches any model, one workspace serves the whole company. Engineers pair on a Claude Code session; analysts hand a dataset to a long-running agent; operations schedule routine work; and everyone shares the prompts and tools that work. Your context carries forward with the pod: everything in /workspace survives across sessions, and Claude Code pods also keep ~/.claude, so credentials and history come back on resume.

  • Engineering — run coding agents in a pod with a built-in browser pane to preview the app beside the terminal.
  • Data and analysis — set a long task running against your data and check back when it is done.
  • Operations and go-to-market — draft, research, and summarize in GenStudio, then schedule the repetitive work to run on its own.

Oversight without babysitting

Shared agents only work if someone can see and bound them. The Control Center governs the whole fleet: encryption in motion and at rest, SSO, DLP, and RBAC decide who reaches which models and agents, while spend guardrails keep costs predictable. Set a monthly budget and choose to block, warn, or allow overage when it is hit; cap spend per member and per group; limit how many pods run at once; and let idle pods auto-sleep and resume on demand. You watch every running pod — its driver, its agent, its cost — from one screen. Read how it works in the Agent Pods guide, or see the full picture on the Agent Pods page.

Bring your own models, keep your own data

SkyDeck is a front end for your AI stack, not another silo. Reach OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and dozens more models through one interface, with no vendor lock-in, so teams standardize on a workspace instead of a single provider. Invite colleagues into any conversation, share a snapshot anyone can open without an account, and move budget and access as priorities change — all from one place your admins control.

Get started
